**VIRAL CLAIM:** Phil Collins has recorded a surprise final album from his assisted-living facility, titled *Still in the Air Tonight*, with all lyrics generated by AI based on his 1980s diary entries.

**FACT CHECK: 🚨 FALSE (Satirical Origin)**

The claim is entirely fabricated. There is no such album. The story originated from a parody news site known for generating fake celebrity headlines. While Phil Collins has faced significant health challenges (including nerve damage and a fractured vertebra) and has difficulty playing drums and singing live, he has not used AI to produce new music and is not currently recording. Furthermore, his son, Nic Collins, has publicly stated that his father’s musical career is effectively concluded. Any post claiming the album exists is a hoax designed to exploit fans' nostalgia.
